intro: Hieracium samnaunicum, also known as the Snaefell Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including inflammation and gastrointestinal issues, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium samnaunicum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Hieracium samnaunicum include infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, which are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
